# Tenant

Get the list of tenants with related policies count.

Use specific policy commands with '--tenant' filtering rule to get the per-tenant policy details.

## Default output

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_tenant.all:iserver.output.default
```

## JSON output

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_tenant.json:iserver.output.default
```

## Developer

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_tenant.all:devel.debug
```
